charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/templ.general_idea: Add configuration support for enterprise API token via secret or value.

Add configuration support for skipping TLS certificate verification.

charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/tests.general_idea: Update Helm chart test snapshots to reflect increased CPU resource limits and added security context configurations.
Add security context and volume mounts to Helm chart test snapshots to match updated deployment templates.
charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/tests.after:
securityContext:
  allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
  capabilities:
    drop:
      - ALL
  readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
volumeMounts:
  - mountPath: /tmp
    name: tmp-dir
  - mountPath: /opt/gatling/target
    name: gatling-target-dir
